title: Milestone Camping Single-side EVA Camping Mattress Aluminum Film Moisture-proof Outdoor Multifunctional Yoga Sleeping Mat
features: INSULATED CAMPING MAT – Enjoy a comfortable and warm camping experience with this insulated camping mat. Measuring at 180 x 50cm, it sleeps a single adult and is made from 6mm EVA foam.

LIGHTWEIGHT AND COMPACT – Ideal for a hiking, camping or backpacking trip, this camping mat can be taken on all your adventures. Its lightweight and compact design means it’s great for being strapped to your backpack and won’t take up much space in your tent or vehicle.

EASY TO SET UP AND STORE – Setting up your mat couldn’t be easier. As a roll mat, it can be set up in seconds by simply removing the pre-fitted roll straps and unrolling. When you’re done using your mat, it rolls up easily for storage and portability.

INSULATION AND MOISTURE PROOF – The mat has an aluminium backing which is moisture-proof to protect you from the cold, damp ground. The foil reflects heat radiated from your body back towards you to provide extra warmth while you sleep and prevents you from losing too much body heat. It recovers quickly when compressed, dries quickly, and can be easily wiped clean.
MILESTONE CAMPING – Milestone Camping is the leading manufacturer of everything you need to enjoy the great outdoors. Visit the Milestone Camping page on Amazon to view the whole range today.
description: Product Description EVA Foam Material Insulated Camping Mat This mat can help to ensure a comfortable and warm sleeping experience when camping. It rolls up for convenient transportation, with straps also included to keep the mat rolled up when on the move. It's not only ideal for sleeping - the soft foam material means it can double up as a yoga mat when indoors or at home. Previous page Pre-Fitted Straps The mat can easily be kept rolled up for storage or transport thanks to the pre-fitted roll straps. Perfect for Outdoors The 6mm thick EVA foam provides a more comfortable, warmer sleep wherever it is used. Easy Setup & Maintenance The mat rolls out easily, dries quickly, and only needs a simple wipe down to clean it. Moisture-Proof Backing Backed by an aluminium foil layer, the mat reflects heat back to keep you warm and dry during sleep. Portable & Compact When rolled up, the mat forms a lightweight, compact shape, ideal to be strapped to a backpack. Next page 1 Pre-Fitted Straps 2 Perfect for Outdoors 3 Easy Setup & Maintenance 4 Moisture-Proof Backing 5 Portable & Compact
